[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Normal) will be doubled. Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Period: 3/3 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 3/10 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
